title: Russia Ramps Up Threats Toward Ukraine Over Victory Day Parade
summary_full: Kremlin officials said a large strike on Kyiv would be “inevitable” if Ukraine disrupted the May 9 event, a prospect President Volodymyr Zelensky has appeared to allude to.
summary_public: Kremlin officials said a large strike on Kyiv would be “inevitable” if Ukraine disrupted the May 9 event, a prospect President Volodymyr Zelensky has appeared to allude to.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russia Ramps Up Threats Toward Ukraine Over Victory Day Parade

UA.label: neutral
UA.evidence: if Ukraine disrupted the May 9 event
